channel.title: Jet Ski on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Jet Ski on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Trini Brief — Auntie Cheryl, April 10, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl from Chaguanas reacts to Angelica Jogie, the Caracas delegation, the new fire tenders, and the ongoing jet ski debate with the full range of emotions the week demands.

item.title: Trini Brief — Trini Dispatch, April 10, 2026
item.description: A seven-year-old is dead at Pigeon Point, the government is sending a delegation to Caracas, PM Persad-Bissessar distributed fire tenders in Penal, and the PNM Tobago council internal election has been rescheduled. Standard.
